title: All Devouring Death | Bhagavad Gita Chapter 10 Verses 30- 35 | HG Amitasana Das | HKM Mumbai
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

We will chant this verse together, Pradadas Chasmi Daityanam, Kala Kalayatam Aham, Mriganam Chamrigendro Aham, Vainateyas Cha Pakshinam
